data.name: Hentai Harem: Xmas tale
data.detailed_description:
Ho Ho Hot: Unwrap the Ultimate Hentai Harem This Holiday

Relax and unwind with classic puzzle gameplay that rewards you with something special. Piece together jigsaws or test your memory with card matching—two timeless puzzle types that are easy to pick up but satisfying to master.

No stress, no timers, no complicated rules. Just you, the puzzles, and some very appealing rewards waiting to be unlocked. Complete each level to reveal high-quality videos that make all that brain work totally worth it.

Whether you're a casual player looking to chill or a puzzle enthusiast ready for a challenge, each stage gets progressively trickier while keeping the vibe relaxed and enjoyable.

For mature audiences only (18+). All characters are 21 or older.

Features:

🍆 23 puzzles to complete with 5 different girls

✨ Two puzzle modes - Classic jigsaw and memory card matching

🎬 Animated videos - Completing puzzles reveals the animations

🎵 Chill background music

⏰ No time limits - Play at your own pace, zero pressure

🎮 One handed gameplay - ;)

🖼️ Gallery mode - Revisit your unlocked content for zero handed gameplay

🐺 Optional (hidden by default) bonus furry content for one of the girls!

Join us on discord!

data.short_description: Feeling naughty this holiday season? Got a hand free? We got you covered! Easy, one handed ;) puzzles and nice videos as rewards when you get through them. Happy holidays!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1050
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel i5 10500
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1060
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 1050
  • DirectX: Version 10
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel i5 10500
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 1060
  • DirectX: Version 10
